title: How To Make Graphene Sheets As Big As You Like
description: this is an interesting method of making graphene sheets in any size you would like. It is an extension of the idea of reducing graphene by nascent hydrogen production and probably well worth playing with to produce large sheets. You can buy kits and materials for your own experiments as well as my ebooks from our webshop at https://secure.workingink.co.uk/working-ink-shop/
